vision_profile.current_state: Ritika is a final-year B.Sc Math student with basic computer skills, eager to start a career in web development.
vision_profile.main_blocker: Her biggest fear is being disadvantaged compared to peers from larger cities with better resources and English proficiency.
vision_profile.top_motivation: She is highly motivated to achieve financial independence to support her family before her younger brother begins college.

milestones.label: P1
milestones.identity_statement: Build a strong base with core programming and web concepts, preparing you for the exciting world of web development.
milestones.market_value_display: Fresher — not yet earning from this skill

modules.title: Basic Programming & Logic
modules.description: Learn the fundamental building blocks of programming and how to think like a developer, using concepts from the AI Ready Course.

skills.title: Introduction to Algorithms
skills.description: Understand what algorithms are and how they help solve problems step-by-step, a core skill for any developer.

scenario.title: Daily Problem Solving with Algorithms

skills.title: Variables and Data Types
skills.description: Learn how to store and manage different kinds of information in your programs, like numbers and text.

scenario.title: Organizing Your Grocery List Data

skills.title: Control Flow (If/Else, Loops)
skills.description: Master how to make your programs make decisions and repeat actions, essential for dynamic applications.

scenario.title: Automating Daily Tasks with Logic

modules.title: Computer Science Essentials
modules.description: Dive into fundamental computer science concepts that underpin all software development, enhancing your problem-solving abilities.

skills.title: Problem Solving Techniques
skills.description: Develop effective strategies to break down complex problems and find efficient solutions, a crucial skill for any developer.

scenario.title: Solving a Real-World Logic Puzzle

skills.title: Basic Data Structures
skills.description: Understand how to organize data efficiently using lists and arrays, making your programs faster and more powerful.

scenario.title: Managing a Library's Book Collection

skills.title: Computational Thinking
skills.description: Learn to break down problems, recognize patterns, and design solutions, a mindset crucial for all programming.

scenario.title: Designing a Simple Game Logic

modules.title: Introduction to Web Concepts
modules.description: Get a clear picture of how the internet and web applications work, from your browser to the server.

skills.title: How the Internet Works
skills.description: Explore the basic infrastructure of the internet and how information travels across the globe.

scenario.title: Tracing Your Online Journey

skills.title: Web Browsers and Servers
skills.description: Understand the roles of browsers (like Chrome) and servers in delivering web content to you.

scenario.title: How a Website Appears on Your Screen

skills.title: URLs and HTTP Basics
skills.description: Learn about web addresses (URLs) and the rules (HTTP) that allow your browser to talk to websites.

scenario.title: Decoding a Web Address Request

milestones.label: P2
milestones.identity_statement: Gain insight into how web applications are structured and how different parts communicate to deliver a seamless user experience.

modules.title: Client-Server Interaction
modules.description: Explore the core communication patterns between the user's device (client) and the web server, using High Level System Design principles.

skills.title: Client-Server Model
skills.description: Understand the fundamental architecture where clients request services from servers, forming the backbone of the web.

scenario.title: Ordering Food Online: A Client-Server Story

skills.title: Request-Response Cycle
skills.description: Learn how your browser sends requests and receives responses from a server, making web pages interactive.

scenario.title: Submitting a Form and Getting Feedback

skills.title: Frontend vs. Backend Roles
skills.description: Clearly differentiate between what users see and interact with (frontend) and the server-side logic (backend).

scenario.title: Building a Simple Online Store

modules.title: Data Flow in Web Apps
modules.description: Understand how data moves, is processed, and stored within a web application, from user input to database storage.

skills.title: Data Transmission Basics
skills.description: Learn the fundamental ways data is sent and received over the internet, ensuring secure and efficient communication.

scenario.title: Securely Sending Your Login Details

skills.title: Introduction to Databases
skills.description: Discover what databases are and why they are essential for storing and managing information in web applications.

video.title: Databases: The Memory of the Web

scenario.title: Storing User Profiles for a Social App

skills.title: Data Storage & Retrieval Concepts
skills.description: Understand how data is saved and fetched from databases, crucial for displaying dynamic content on websites.

scenario.title: Updating Your Profile Picture Online

modules.title: Basic System Architecture
modules.description: Learn about different ways web applications are built and scaled, from simple setups to complex distributed systems.

skills.title: Monolithic vs. Microservices
skills.description: Compare traditional all-in-one application designs with modern, smaller, independent service architectures.

video.title: Big App vs. Small Apps: Monoliths & Microservices

scenario.title: Designing a Growing E-commerce Platform

skills.title: Load Balancing & Scalability
skills.description: Learn how web applications handle many users at once and grow to serve more traffic efficiently.

video.title: Handling Many Users: Scaling Web Apps

scenario.title: Managing Traffic for a Popular News Site

skills.title: Caching Fundamentals
skills.description: Discover how caching speeds up websites by storing frequently accessed data closer to the user.

scenario.title: Improving Performance for a Weather App

milestones.label: P3
milestones.identity_statement: Learn about the essential components that make up modern web applications, from APIs to database design, and how they fit together.

modules.title: API Fundamentals
modules.description: Understand how different software systems communicate with each other using APIs, a critical skill for frontend developers.

skills.title: What are APIs?
skills.description: Discover how Application Programming Interfaces (APIs) allow different software to talk to each other, like a waiter in a restaurant.

scenario.title: Integrating a Map into Your Website

skills.title: RESTful API Concepts
skills.description: Learn about REST, a popular and powerful way to design APIs for web services, making them easy to use.

scenario.title: Fetching Product Info for an Online Store

skills.title: API Communication & Data Formats
skills.description: Understand how data is exchanged through APIs, focusing on common formats like JSON, which is key for frontend.

scenario.title: Reading Data from a Weather API

modules.title: Data Storage Concepts
modules.description: Deepen your understanding of different database types and how to design them for efficient data management.

skills.title: Relational Databases
skills.description: Learn about structured databases like SQL, where data is organized in tables with relationships.

scenario.title: Designing a Database for Student Records

skills.title: NoSQL Databases
skills.description: Explore flexible, non-relational databases that are great for handling large amounts of unstructured data.

scenario.title: Storing Blog Posts with Tags and Comments

skills.title: Database Schema Design Basics
skills.description: Learn how to plan and structure your database to ensure data is stored efficiently and can be easily accessed.

scenario.title: Creating a Database for an Event Management System

modules.title: Project Planning & Design Basics
modules.description: Understand the lifecycle of software development and key design principles that make applications user-friendly and effective.

skills.title: Software Development Lifecycle
skills.description: Learn the different stages involved in building software, from planning to deployment and maintenance.

scenario.title: Planning a New Feature for an App

skills.title: User Stories & Requirements
skills.description: Learn how to define what a software needs to do from the user's perspective, guiding development.

scenario.title: Writing Requirements for a Chat App

skills.title: Basic UI/UX Principles
skills.description: Understand the basics of designing user interfaces (UI) and user experiences (UX) to make applications easy and pleasant to use.

scenario.title: Improving the Design of a Mobile App
